data.title: audit: normalize skogai-caveman `autonomous-development` skill
data.description:
Repo: `/home/skogix/.local/src/marketplace/plugins/skogai-caveman`

Review the repo-local `skills/autonomous-development/` skill and bring it in line with current SkogAI routing/skill conventions.

Scope:

* audit `skills/autonomous-development/SKILL.md` and supporting files
* verify the coordinator/sub-agent pattern is still coherent
* check for stale path assumptions or outdated repo references
* identify whether parts should move into workflows/references/templates for better progressive disclosure
* align wording with current repo-local routing style

Done when:

* the skill has a clear issue owner/scope in Linear
* gaps and normalization work are documented
* follow-up implementation can update the skill without rediscovery
